one_line_description: Industrial-feel Wynwood event venue at 2136 NW 1st Ave with over 70,000 square feet of adaptable space, skylights, a bar area and two outdoor courtyards.
Six-acre Wynwood campus at 318 NW 23rd St offering versatile spaces including a convention center, Mana Wynwood 320 and the RC Cola plant for events and productions.
Outdoor street-art museum at 2516 NW 2nd Ave that hosts private events surrounded by world-famous murals, with customizable spaces for gatherings.
122,000-square-foot television, film and event studio facility at 4000 NW 36th Ave with seven sound stages, cyclorama walls and a dedicated event venue.
Private 3,000-square-foot photo and content studio at 4600 SW 75th Ave with a 25-foot cyclorama wall, styled sets and event rental availability.
Indoor-outdoor wellness and event destination at 105 NE 24th Street with modernist interiors, reflecting pools and tropical gardens for private and corporate events.
Nonprofit arts center in a historic Art Deco bakery building at 561 NW 32nd Street offering studio, exhibition and event space for receptions and concerts.
Standalone Art Deco event venue in South Beach with 360-degree projection architecture, an outdoor terrace and commercial kitchen for events up to 500 guests.
Waterfront contemporary art museum at 1103 Biscayne Blvd offering event spaces including the East Portico, terraces and full museum buyouts overlooking Biscayne Bay.

business_name: Phillip and Patricia Frost Museum of Science
one_line_description: Science museum at 1101 Biscayne Blvd with event spaces including a four-level aquarium, planetarium, atrium and rooftop terrace overlooking Biscayne Bay.
National Historic Landmark estate at 3251 South Miami Ave offering its courtyard, terraces and formal gardens on Biscayne Bay for evening rentals and ceremonies.
Contemporary art museum at 2100 Collins Avenue with flexible event spaces including the Cejas Gallery, Lindemann Courtyard and Collins Park for private events.
Contemporary art museum at 1100 NW 23 St with art-filled galleries, a dedicated East Wing event space, research library and native-plant garden for events.
Landmark Miami Design District building featuring Zaha Hadid's Elastika installation, with private dining rooms and a top-floor Gallery space for events.
A 3,500-square-foot rooftop bar and lounge on the 22nd floor of the AC & Element Miami Brickell with skyline views and private event spaces for 18 to 150 guests.
A 4,514-square-foot open-air rooftop on the 9th floor of Arlo Wynwood at 2217 NW Miami Court with a resort-style pool, cabanas and bar for receptions up to 350.
Historic clubhouse at 1001 & 1009 E. Ponce de Leon Blvd with two classic ballrooms featuring wood-beamed ceilings, antique chandeliers and a kitchen and bar.
Glamorous three-level event venue at 3157 Commodore Plaza with atrium ceilings, stained-glass windows, marble staircases and a third-level Cruz Ballroom.
Art-filled restaurant and event space at 2727 NW 2nd Ave in Wynwood with a large indoor-outdoor patio available for buyouts and private events.
An 8,500-square-foot Mexican-Asian restaurant and nightlife venue at 127 NW 23rd St with indoor dining rooms and an open-air courtyard for group events.
Waterfront Greek restaurant at 450 NW N River Dr along the Miami River with signature private event spaces including the Library, Garden, Atrium and Den.
A 10,000-square-foot Asian food hall at 143 NW 23rd Street in Wynwood with indoor and outdoor seating, bars, a karaoke room and private event hosting.
Wynwood restaurant and event space with private rooms, a Jungle Oasis patio and a gallery with full audio-visual setup, plus full buyouts for up to 250 guests.
Food hall and rooftop bar at 8300 NE Second Avenue with local food vendors, retail and a rooftop space available for event bookings overlooking Little River.
